surfaces.purpose: Define the spatial depth hierarchy of the interface. Each level communicates a distinct layer of information architecture.
surfaces.allowed_use: Background colors for page regions, panels, overlays, and highlight states. Must be used in order of depth.
surfaces.prohibited_use: Do not use surface tokens for text color. Do not use surface tokens as border colors. Do not apply surface-overlay or surface-highlight to primary content backgrounds.

ink.purpose: Define text color hierarchy. Three levels ensure readable content scanning from primary headings to muted metadata.
ink.allowed_use: Text, heading, label, and metadata color. Use primary for headings and key content, secondary for body text, muted for supporting metadata.
ink.prohibited_use: Do not use ink tokens as background colors. Do not use ink-inverse on dark surfaces.

signal_colors.purpose: Navigation, primary action, and spatial connector accent. Communicates directionality and primary interface interaction.
signal_colors.allowed_use: Primary navigation links, signal path connectors, focus rings, primary action buttons, interactive element hover states.
signal_colors.prohibited_use: Do not use signal tokens for trust indicators (use trust tokens). Do not use signal tokens for commercial CTAs (use action tokens). Do not use signal glow as primary decoration.

trust_colors.purpose: Established authority, evidence, verified claims, and institutional credibility signals.
trust_colors.allowed_use: Evidence markers, verified claim indicators, trust plane backgrounds, source citation accents.
trust_colors.prohibited_use: Do not use trust tokens on commercial or action surfaces. Do not use trust color for primary navigation. Do not use trust glow as decoration.

action_colors.purpose: Commercial CTAs and monetization surfaces. Signals a consequential, opted-in user action.
action_colors.allowed_use: Primary CTAs on routes where monetization_allowed is true. Secondary CTA accents on action-layer routes.
action_colors.prohibited_use: Do not use action tokens on routes where monetization_allowed is false. Do not use action color for navigation or trust signals. Action amber must never appear as decoration.

borders.purpose: Define spatial edge definition between surfaces. Four levels from barely-visible to focused signal.
borders.allowed_use: Panel borders, dividers, input borders, focused element outlines. Use border-subtle for ambient separation, border-signal for interactive or focused elements.
borders.prohibited_use: Do not mix border levels on the same element class. Do not use border-signal as general decoration.

spacing.purpose: Consistent spatial rhythm. Token-governed spacing prevents ad-hoc layout decisions.
spacing.allowed_use: All padding, margin, gap, and inset values. Scale from --space-1 (4px) to --space-24 (96px).
spacing.prohibited_use: Do not use arbitrary pixel values for spacing. Do not mix token spacing with hardcoded em or px values in the same ruleset.

radius.purpose: Consistent border radius. Institutional but not harsh — subtle rounding signals precision.
radius.allowed_use: Panels, buttons, inputs, labels, tags. Use xs for very small elements, md for panels and inputs, lg for primary containers.
radius.prohibited_use: Do not use radius-xl on navigation elements. Do not use full-circle radius (50%) for non-icon elements.

depth.purpose: Shadow and glow tokens that reinforce spatial hierarchy. Depth communicates information architecture, not drama.
depth.allowed_use: Panel elevation shadows, interactive element focus glows, spatial container depth.
depth.prohibited_use: Do not use lg or glow-signal on body-level elements. Do not stack multiple shadow tokens on a single element. Do not use glow as primary decoration.

motion.purpose: Token-governed animation timing. All transitions must reference these tokens — no ad-hoc durations.
motion.allowed_use: CSS transition and animation duration values. Use fast for hover state changes, base for panel state changes, slow for reveal effects.
motion.prohibited_use: Do not use durations outside this token set without a documented decision log entry. Do not use motion as a loading placeholder.

focus.purpose: Keyboard focus visibility governance. Focus states must never be suppressed.
focus.allowed_use: outline on :focus-visible for all interactive elements. outline-color should be --signal-primary. outline-offset of 2-4px.
focus.prohibited_use: Do not suppress outline on :focus. Do not use color-only focus indication. Do not rely on browser default focus styles without enhancement.
